body.title: Fix broken test: test_create_book_anchor_node
body.result: Fixed UUID collision via uuid.uuid4() per test, assert format not exact ID. Both test_create_book_anchor_node and test_create_book_anchor_node_no_author now pass.
body.description: UUID collision in test fixture — uses fixed UUID that already exists in real DB. Function returns existing ID instead of new one. Use random UUID per-test, assert format not exact value.
